description: Recover dual-environment checkout activation and environment-scoped e-mail verification without creating or replaying payments.
deploymentOrder: run npm run ci, the secret scanner, and deno check for the three affected Edge Functions
verify required secret names without reading their values
deploy send-verification-code, verify-code, and payments-webhook from this exact commit
publish the frontend from this exact commit
do not invoke checkout, payment functions, Stripe events, verification delivery, or manual replay
wait for Stripe automatic retry and perform an aggregate read-only audit
